name: Class Informer
author: NightfallCT
description: Reconstructs C++ class hierarchies from MSVC RTTI
longdescription:
# Class Informer

A port of the [IDA Pro Class Informer plugin](https://github.com/kweatherman/IDA_ClassInformer_PlugIn) by Sirmabus / kweatherman, rewritten for Binary Ninja.

Scans MSVC-compiled binaries for C++ Run-Time Type Identification (RTTI) data. It locates `CompleteObjectLocators` (COL), `TypeDescriptors`, `ClassHierarchyDescriptors`, and virtual function tables (vftables). Found structures are annotated with names and comments, and a results pane lists all discovered classes with their full inheritance hierarchy.

## Features

- Two-pass vftable scanner (COL-anchored + segment sweep)
- Reconstructs full class hierarchy strings (e.g. `CEdit:CWnd:CCmdTarget:CObject`)
- Annotates vftables, method slots, and RTTI structures with symbols and comments
- Results pane with sortable table of all discovered classes
- Save / load scan results to a sidecar JSON file
- Supports both 32-bit and 64-bit MSVC binaries

## Usage

Open an MSVC-compiled PE binary in Binary Ninja, then run **Plugins → Class Informer → Run Scan** from the menu or command palette.

installinstructions.Windows:
Clone or download this repository into your Binary Ninja user plugins directory:
```
%APPDATA%\Binary Ninja\plugins\binja_class_informer\
```
Restart Binary Ninja. The plugin will appear under **Plugins → Class Informer**.
